summary: Comprehensive testing of P1 (Admin unlock verifications) and P2 (Employee settings and documents backend connection). All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested and frontend UI verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All employee profile endpoints working correctly: GET/PUT /api/employee/profile
Password change validates current password correctly with proper error messages
Notification settings persist in employee_settings collection
Documents endpoint returns both uploaded documents and signed contracts
Contract download returns PDF with correct content-type
Admin unlock endpoint validates status before allowing unlock
Frontend Settings page loads data from backend (name, email, phone, position, address)
Frontend Documents page shows signed contracts with download functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test applicants for unlock flow testing: unlocktest123@example.com and unlockbuttontest@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 and P2 features fully tested and working. Employee settings page loads profile from /api/employee/profile. Documents page shows signed contracts from /api/employee/documents. Admin can unlock verified users via /api/applications/{id}/unlock with status changing from 'Verifiziert' to 'Freigeschaltet'. Test employee has 2 signed contracts visible in documents page.

P1_admin_verifications: Admin verifications page shows pending verifications - PASS
'Wartet auf Freischaltung' badge for verified users - PASS
'Freischalten' button visible for verified users - PASS
Clicking Freischalten shows confirmation dialog - PASS
After unlock, status changes to 'Freigeschaltet' - PASS
DSGVO notice about ID documents displayed - PASS
View (eye icon) button present for each verification - PASS
P2_employee_settings_profile: Profile includes name, email, phone, position, department - PASS
PUT /api/employee/profile updates phone and address - PASS
Frontend loads profile data from backend - PASS
P2_employee_password_change: POST /api/employee/change-password with wrong current password fails - PASS
Error message 'Aktuelles Passwort ist falsch' displayed - PASS
Successful password change with correct current password - PASS
P2_employee_notifications: Settings persist and return in profile - PASS
P2_employee_documents: Contract documents have category 'Verträge' and status 'approved' - PASS
Frontend shows 2 document cards for signed contracts - PASS
P2_employee_document_download: Frontend Download button present on document cards - PASS
